titlestmt.titleproper: Southern Tier Central Planning and Development Board reports4476

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Southern Tier Central Planning and Development Board reports

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Southern Tier Central Planning and Development Board (N.Y.)

origination.corpname: New York (State). Legislature. Legislative Commission on Rural Resources

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: New York State Energy Research and Development Authority

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: New York (State). Office of Planning Coordination

origination.corpname: New York (State). Temporary State Commission to Study the Catskills

origination.corpname: Southern Tier West Regional Planning and Development Board

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Central New York Regional Planning and Development Board

did.abstract: Planning reports from the New York State Legislative Commission on Rural Resources, New York State Energy Research and Development Authority, New York State Office of Planning Coordination, New York State Temporary State Commission to Study the Catskills, Southern Tier Regional Planning and Development Board, Southern Tier West Regional Planning and Development Board, Capital District Regional Planning Commission, Central New York Regional Planning and Development Board, and Genesee/Finger Lakes Regional Planning Council, as well as planning reports from Chemung and Steuben Counties, and miscellaneous planning documents.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Planning reports from the New York State Legislative Commission on Rural Resources, New York State Energy Research and Development Authority, New York State Office of Planning Coordination, New York State Temporary State Commission to Study the Catskills, Southern Tier Regional Planning and Development Board, Southern Tier West Regional Planning and Development Board, Capital District Regional Planning Commission, Central New York Regional Planning and Development Board, and Genesee/Finger Lakes Regional Planning Council, as well as planning reports from Chemung and Steuben Counties, and miscellaneous planning documents.

defitem.label: Series I. NYS, Legislative Commission on Rural Resources
Series II. NYS, Energy Research and Development Authority (ERDA)
Series III. NYS, Office of Planning Coordination
Series IV. NYS, Temporary State Commission to Study the Catskills
Series V. Southern Tier East Regional Planning and Development Board
Series VI. Southern Tier Central Regional Planning and Development Board
Series VII. Southern Tier West Regional Planning and Development Board
Series VIII. Capital District Regional Planning Commission
Series IX. Central New York Regional Planning and Development Board
Series X. Genesee/Finger Lakes Regional Planning Council
Series XI. Chemung County planning documents
Series XII. Steuben County planning documents

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Southern Tier Central Planning and Development Board Reports, #4476. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Regional planning -- New York (State) -- Steuben County.
Regional planning -- New York (State) -- Chemung County.
Regional planning -- New York (State)
